title: FlyBoost
description: Fly Boost increases flight speed in creative by 6 times
body:
FlyBoost makes you be able to fly faster in creative mode, wich can be useful for when building something or just to travel around your world


Features:
6x the Creative mode flight speed.
works only in creative.

Compatible: Should work with all other mods and made for Minecraft version 1.21.

Installation:
Download FlyBoost from Modrinth.
Place the mod file into your Minecraft mods folder.
Start Minecraft.

Back up your world before installing any mods.
Requires Fabric api.
